Object.Field: pmt_meth_type.prcss_clsd_dttm = CAST('2050-12-31 23:59:59' AS TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DDbHH:MI:SS') AND pmt_meth_type.pmt_meth_type_cd <> 'NA'
